raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Zedeſtjus Knaëna
Dehſs darrija ſew dselses Rag-
gus/ un fazzija: Ta ſakka tas
KUNGS: Ar ſcheim badditi
tu tohs Sihrerus/ teekains tu
tohs buhſi tſdeldejs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ir wiſſt Praweeschi flud-
dinaja tahs nahkamas Leetas/
ta fazzidami: Zellees us Rahmo-
tu eekſch Gileadas/ tew buhs lab-
ba Laime/ jo tas KUNGS dohs
winnu ta Kehnina Rohkå.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Webſtnetis/ kas
bija gabjis Mikkut aizinaht/ run-
naja us to/ un fazzija: Ruigi
jelle/ tee Praweeschi runna ar
weenu Mutti labbu preekſch ta
Kehnixa/ laid jelle taws Wahrdß
ta patt irr ka winnu Wahrdß/un
runna labbu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet Mikkus fazzija: Tik
teescham ka tas KUNGS dfih-
wo/ ko mans Deews tam faz-
zihß/ to gribbu es runnaht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad wiꞥſch preekſch ta
Kehnixa nahze/ tad fazzija tas
Kehutisch us winnu: Mikkus/
buhß mumß us Rahmotu eekſch
Gileadas Kaṙṙå eet/ jeb buhe
man to pamets? un tas fazztja:
Zelleetecs/ jums buhs labba Lat-
me/ jo tee taps juhtt Rohkå
dohti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tas Kehutisch fazzi-
ja us winnu: Es tew Lahgu
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch fazzija:
cedſeju wiſſu Israëlu/ ka tee
Kalneem bija iſkaifitti/ ittin
Awis/ kam Ganna newaid/
tas KUNGS fazzija: Schee
Runga newaid/ lai eet ikkatrs
Meeru Jawå Namunå.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija tas Israë
Kehninsch us Josawatu: W
es tew ne efmu fazzijß/ ka wiṅ
pahr man ue labbu/ bet tau
ween fluddina.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wehl fazzija (Mikku
Tadeht klaufajt ta KUNG
Wahrdß: Es redſeju to Ku
Gll us fawu Gohdthas Kreb
febschaim/ un wiſſu Deb
Spehku ap winnu stabwim
labbo un pa fretfo Rohku.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGS fazzj
Kurſch pahrrunnahß Akabu
Israëta Kehnizu/ ka tas zelſa
un kritt Rahmotå eekſch Gil
das? un weens runnaju fch
ohtrß ta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad iſgahje weens Ga
un peestahjeß ta KUNG
Breekſcha/ un fazzija: Es pa
runnaſchu winnu. Bet
KUNGS fazzija us to: Zaur
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch fazzija: Es
eefchu/ un buhſchu weens Mel
Bars wiſſu winna Prawees
Mutte. Un wiꞥſch fazzija: D
buhß winnu pahrrunnahß un
"
    }
